decision.reason: batch_execution.throughput_claim_eligible=false; artifact_path must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; c1_baseline_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; serial_bridge_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; execution.batch_execution.row_execution must not contain serial or fallback; execution.batch_execution.native_caware_decode must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.full_attention_decode_path must be native_batch; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[15].native_caware_decode must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[15].full_attention_decode_path must be native_batch; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions native full-attention count must match native_full_attention_layers; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.blockers must be empty; profiler kernel names must include selected projection_dispatch candidate or variant;
